title: Optimus report_data contract
description: Shape of the 19-key namespace exposed to the rendered HTML report and external tooling. Produced by optimus.report_context.build_report_context. Phase J introduced this contract; Phase K froze it for the v0.7.0 GA. Many keys are nullable (the section's renderer treats null/empty as 'skip this panel' rather than throwing).

session.description: Session-level metadata (uuid, title, user, status, started_at, stopped_at, total_*_ms).

tldr.description: TL;DR hero block. {headline_html, subline_html} both HTML-safe Markup.

kpis.description: Top-of-page KPI strip; 4 items in document order.

findings.description: All findings in the contract-shape (severity lowercased, title_html, etc.). Distinct from the legacy report_data.findings_by_app non-contract passthrough.

line_drilldown_runs.description: Phase 2 line-profile runs (renamed Line-Level Drilldown in Phase J.16). [{number, status, total_ms_display, timestamp, picks, functions}, ...].

line_drilldown_html.description: Pre-rendered server-side HTML for the Line-Level Drilldown panel.

action_plan.description: Recommended action plan. Each item {number, title_html, description_html, savings_display, savings_label, callsite}.

waterfall.description: Per-action waterfall rows. Each item {width_pct, kind, is_hot_text, duration_display}.

actions.description: Per-action breakdown rows for user-code actions. Each item contains contract shape + legacy spread fields.

actions_framework.description: Non-contract pragmatic addition: framework-code actions. Same shape as ``actions``.

background_jobs_framework.description: Non-contract pragmatic addition: framework RQ jobs.

background_jobs_summary.description: Non-contract aggregates: {count, total_ms, total_queries, any_findings_counted, framework_count}.

doc_events.description: Doc-event lifecycle. {doctypes: [{methods, hooks}, ...]} on populated sessions; empty list when no doc events were captured (renderer treats both as 'no panel').

resource.description: Server resource cards. {cards: [...]} with 4 KPI-style cards.

hot_frames.description: User-code hot frames. Contract folds the framework split into a flat list with is_user_code flag.

slow_queries.description: Top slow queries. Items carry SQL strings post-redaction (Phase K).

large_duration_threshold_ms.description: Threshold above which timings are rendered with the .time-high accent (default 1000).
